title: 成るか成らぬか“不動心”

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ngyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through campus when I suddenly hear
a shout that feels as if it's reverberating through
the very ground.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... T-Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Well... Take a look at the floor.

text_block_list.name: Kittens
text_block_list.text: Mew. ♪ Purrr, purrr... ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm training my heart to remain still while these
kittens cling to me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Every time I see something fragile and adorable,
I'm overcome with a desire to protect it. I've been
struggling with this weakness for as long as I can
remember.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Just the other day, I was so captivated by a kitten
that I forgot to pick up my school bag when I left.
It was utterly shameful.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I might end up making a critical
mistake and failing to protect those who cannot
fend for themselves.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To remain so composed that even my excessive
desire to protect remains in check—that is the
goal I wish to accomplish... at any cost!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like this is a much bigger issue for her
than I first thought. I decide to lend a hand,
however small, in her quest for composure.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Arf, arf! The name's Sakura Chihuahua O! Let's
play fetch, Yaeno! Woof!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Haaah... Rin pyo toh sha kai jin retsu zai zen...
Guardians of those who do battle, protect me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the help of her friends, Yaeno
Muteki trains to overcome cuteness...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I heard some puppies were born near the
academy! Wanna go see 'em?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...No. I'm busy with my training, so I'm afraid I
have to refuse.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't be like that! Watchin' adorable little
puppies all huddled up for an afternoon nap is
good for the soul!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ngh! I'm not going!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?! ...Whazzup with her?

text_block_list.name: Baby Dolphin
text_block_list.text: Eek... Eek?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Look, they're super intrigued by you, Yaeno! Are
you gonna be okay? You sure you can resist?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...All right! That's three minutes! It's a new record!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having grown tremendously, Yaeno Muteki is
now ready to face the last hurdle.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see, so this is my final trial? ...A cat cafe?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The trial that awaits beyond these doors is the
equivalent of a G1 race in my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Even so, my heart harbors no doubt.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll tackle the cuteness head-on... I need only
carry the pride of the Yaegaki style in my heart to
emerge triumphant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While Yaeno Muteki is brimming with confidence, she seems still and collected. After what she's been through already, she should be able to overcome this final test with ease.

text_block_list.name: Feline Army
text_block_list.text: Meooow! ♪ Mrrreooow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I c-can't take it any longer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Yet, she's unable to overcome the trial.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! It's dangerous to climb so high! Quick, leap
into my arms!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Agh! Wolfing your food down like that could lead
to choking! You need to take your time!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaah! She jumped onto my lap! I-I have to
protect her... I must protect her at all costs!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: As much as it pains me... I understand!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, this is truly heaven! None of these cats
have a worry in the world. They're all just relaxing
and enjoying life. What a sight!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No matter what happens, I must ensure this
tranquility is preserved!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, Yaeno Muteki is even more
mellowed out than the cats... It looks like not
even the strictest training can help her overcome
this weakness.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh?! M-my... com...po...sure! Osu! Osu! OSU!

text_block_list.name: Kitten
text_block_list.text: Meow! Meow!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Osu, osu, oshu, oshu-shu, ahhh! What's wrong,
cutie? What are you nudging me for? There,
there. Let me give you a hu—ah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, it's no use! I just can't overcome this
Achilles' heel!
